title: Make a SpiderIQ Tenant Page LLM-Readable (GEO)
summary: Make a tenant page LLM-readable for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) by enabling the W6+W7 GEO extension family — /llms.txt, RSS/Atom/JSON feeds, sitemap.xml + robots.txt, schema.org JSON-LD head injection, contextual menu (Copy as MD / JSON-LD / Open in ChatGPT), human/agent view toggle. Use whenever the user asks about 'AI search SEO', 'GEO', 'Generative Engine Optimization', 'llms.txt', 'schema.org JSON-LD', 'make my site visible to ChatGPT', 'AI overviews ranking', 'crawlable for LLMs', 'AI-search-friendly'. Single PATCH on content_settings.extensions enables six extensions / seven endpoints.
